prompt: Brand colors: primary #0d9488, deep #0f766e. Illustration style: Flat geometric illustration, 2-3 color limit using brand palette, generous whitespace, no photorealism, soft edges, modern editorial feel. Style of Magoz meets Headspace's Christoph Niemann. Reference brands to mimic: Calm, Headspace, Mira, Linear. Avoid: stock photo silver-haired couple in wheat field; fake clinical iconography. A clean studio product photograph of a small modern rechargeable in-ear consumer hearing device resting in its compact charging case on a soft neutral light gray surface, premium ecommerce lighting, no text, no logos, no packaging, no people.
